# Jared Alexander Masters

> Composer, producer, songwriter, and mixer creating original scores and music production for film, brands, and recording artists.

## Who
Jared Alexander Masters is an American composer and music producer. He writes original
scores for documentaries and commercials, produces and tracks full-band records, writes
songs across Americana, rock, reggae, and EDM, and mixes and remixes records.

## Notable work
- Original score for "The North Face Presents: Earthside"
- "The Meaningless Pursuit of Snow" (Patagonia Films)
- "Journey to 100" (Athletic Brewing)
- "Subaru & Brooklyn Bell"
- "La Sportiva Brand Anthem"
- "Crossing Tasmania", "Define Your Future", "Go There Vol. III — Elan Hagens"

## Recognition
- 2023 Banff Mountain Film Festival — Official Selection
- 2023 Mountainfilm — Official Selection

## Select clients & collaborators
The North Face, Patagonia, Subaru, Athletic Brewing, La Sportiva, and the band 311
(collaboration with Nick Hexum).

## Services
Composing, music production, songwriting, mixing.

## Listen
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/2Md7M22tlVlX2cTkyeQEIX
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/jared-masters/1507866047
Vinyl: https://www.outermarkerrecords.com
